name: English Tea Cake
recipeInstructions:
(served at English High Tea)
Preheat oven to 250 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour a small tube pan. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth. Add eggs, beating thoroughly after each addition. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together into a separate bowl. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing gently with a spatula. Stir in vanilla extract and cherry juice. Gently fold in maraschino cherries and raisins until evenly distributed throughout the batter. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until firm and golden brown on top.
